headlines.headline: Yorval Partners secures $250M contract with a global retailer

sentiment.reasoning: Securing a significant $250M contract provides immediate revenue visibility and positive momentum for the company.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
